## What does this PR do?

A clear description of the change.

## Related issue

Required for anything beyond a small bug fix or typo.
Reference the issue so it auto-closes, for example use `Closes #XYZ`.

## Type of change

Check all that apply

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / code quality
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Checklist

- [ ] This PR is focused on a single concern
- [ ] An issue was opened and acknowledged before writing this code (if not a small fix)
- [ ] The PR is under ~300 lines changed, excluding lock files and generated code
- [ ] Tests have been added or updated where applicable
- [ ] Documentation has been updated where applicable
- [ ] `uv run hatch run validate` passes locally

## Notes for the reviewer

Anything that would help review this. Tricky areas, alternative approaches considered, screenshots, etc.
